candidate_definition_hints.text: Software Development Kit for Analog Device's MAX-series microcontrollers

The Maxim Microcontrollers SDK (MSDK), now a part of [Analog Devices](https://www.analog.com/en/index.html), contains the necessary software and tools to develop firmware for the [MAX32xxx and MAX78xxx Microcontrollers](https://www.analog.com/en/parametricsearch/10984). This inc…
